'''Derliff''' was the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] of a region that contained the [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space's]] [[Silken Asteroids]] cluster. In the earliest days of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], he tried to repel the minor [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] base in the Silken Asteroids, but Rebel [[General/Legends|General]] [[Jan Dodonna/Legends|Jan Dodonna]] [[Battle in the Silken Asteroids|managed]] to hold it and drove Derliff's forces out.

==Behind the scenes==
Moff Derliff appears in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' during the [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia]] campaign's challenge mission. The mission and thus Derliff is also included in the game's [[2002]] expansion pack, [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|''Clone Campaigns'']].
